title: orchiodes tesselatum
intro: Orchiodes tesselatum, also known as the Tesselated Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The Tesselated Orchid has been traditionally used to promote digestive health and relieve menstrual cramps, among other health benefits. Herbal preparations of Orchiodes tesselatum can be made by infusing the roots in water or alcohol, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
